title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: Deepseek V4 employs hybrid attention mechanisms combining Contextual Sparse Attention and Hybrid Contextual Attention to handle a 1 million token context window efficiently. Key techniques include sliding window attention, sparse selection, residual connections with multiplicative heterogeneous composition, anticipatory routing, and the Muon optimizer to achieve state-of-the-art efficiency and performance.
